title: Charm Cotton Fresh Air Freshener Spray 240ml x 3 - Long Lasting Odour Eliminator, Clean & Refreshing Scent for Home, Office, Bathroom & Kitchen with Welari Thank You Card | (3 Pack)
features: 🌿 Fresh Cotton Scent – Enjoy the timeless clean and crisp aroma of cotton that refreshes your home or workspace and leaves a welcoming atmosphere.
🏠 Odour Eliminator – Effectively neutralises and removes unpleasant odours such as cooking smells, pets, smoke, and dampness for a fresher environment.
✨ Versatile Use – Perfect for bathrooms, kitchens, living rooms, bedrooms, offices, or anywhere that needs instant freshness and a clean scent.

🕒 Long-Lasting Freshness – Provides lasting fragrance with every spray, ensuring your rooms stay fresh and inviting for longer. Everyday Essential – A must-have for maintaining a fresh, hygienic, and pleasant-smelling environment wherever you are.

📏 Handy 240ml Size – Compact and lightweight can for convenient storage or carrying, ideal for everyday use in homes or workplaces. Easy-to-use spray can with a fine mist design for fast, even distribution that instantly revitalises any space.
